headline: Is FactSet (FDS) Using Valutico Integration To Quietly Redefine Its Private‑Markets Edge?
summary: In May 2026, FactSet Research Systems Inc. announced a partnership with Valutico to connect its Cobalt portfolio monitoring platform directly to Valutico’s valuation tools, creating an integrated, end-to-end valuation workflow for private capital markets. This integration aims to replace spreadsheet-heavy processes with a single, connected system that links portfolio data, valuation models, and reporting across the investment lifecycle. Next, we’ll examine how this integrated...
